scripts.build: npm --prefix ../omega-pac run build && npm --prefix ../omega-target run build && npm --prefix ../omega-web run build && node build.js
scripts.dev: npm link omega-target && npm link omega-web && npm link omega-pac
scripts.release: npm --prefix ../omega-pac run build && npm --prefix ../omega-target run build && npm --prefix ../omega-web run build && node build.js release
